name: software-bug-fix
description: Bug repair pipeline that separates product root cause from system/process root cause, then turns the failure into a regression and knowledge update.

stages.name: reproduce
review_focus: Reproduction steps are concrete
Observed and expected behavior are both stated
Evidence is external to the agent claim

stages.name: root_cause
review_focus: Root cause cites code or behavior evidence
Failure family is reusable
Confidence is calibrated

stages.name: system_fault
review_focus: At least one missing guardrail is identified
Decision log considers product-only vs system-first repair
Prevention is specific enough to implement

stages.name: product_patch
review_focus: Patch plan is minimal
Risk and rollback plan are explicit
Verification commands match blast radius

stages.name: verification
review_focus: Verification evidence is command-backed
Blocked checks are called blocked, not passed
Scope matches the patch risk

stages.name: regression
review_focus: Regression captures the failure family, not just one symptom
Replay command is explicit

stages.name: knowledge_update
review_focus: Knowledge update has a concrete trigger
Update target is scoped
No broad process change without evidence
